description_long: This is an electric kettle with a rounded, slightly tapered body made of off-white plastic and accented with peach-colored trim at the base and handle. The handle is large, arched, and side-mounted, providing a comfortable grip, and features a prominent button near the top for operation. The kettle has a spout for pouring and a domed lid with a recessed grip, likely designed to be removable for filling and cleaning. Measurement markings are visible on the side, indicating water levels up to 1.7 liters. The base is slightly raised and ringed, suggesting an integrated heating plate for electric operation. The overall design is utilitarian and plain, with no visible decorative patterns.
description: A rounded, off-white electric kettle with a peach base and handle, featuring a side-mounted arched handle, spout, and measurement markings. The design is plain and functional, with a domed removable lid.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the kettle with the water level markings, the arched handle, and the spout clearly visible.
description_view_1: This rear view highlights the smooth, plain back of the kettle, with the spout and lid just visible at the top.
description_view_2: This side view displays the opposite side of the kettle, again showing the water level markings, spout, and the handle from a different angle.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the handle side, showing the large arched handle, the operation button, and the peach-colored base trim.
attribute_lid_design: domed removable lid with recessed grip
